name: Data Pipeline Deployment
description: Deploy 3 Dataflow Gen2 items (DF_Finance, DF_HR, DF_Operations) with Lakehouse data destinations and 1 orchestration Data Pipeline (PL_HorizonBooks_Orchestration) that chains DataFlows and 4 Notebooks sequentially.

tasks.name: Resolve Prerequisites
tasks.description: Look up BronzeLH Lakehouse ID and verify 4 HorizonBooks notebooks (NB01-NB04) exist in the workspace.

tasks.name: Create DF_Finance Dataflow
tasks.description: Create HorizonBooks_DF_Finance DataFlow Gen2 with Power Query M mashup for 4 tables (DimAccounts, DimCostCenters, FactFinancialTransactions, FactBudget) targeting BronzeLH.

tasks.name: Create DF_HR Dataflow
tasks.description: Create HorizonBooks_DF_HR DataFlow Gen2 with Power Query M mashup for 5 tables (DimEmployees, DimDepartments, FactPayroll, FactPerformanceReviews, FactRecruitment) targeting BronzeLH.

tasks.name: Create DF_Operations Dataflow
tasks.description: Create HorizonBooks_DF_Operations DataFlow Gen2 with Power Query M mashup for 8 tables (DimBooks, DimAuthors, DimCustomers, DimGeography, DimWarehouses, FactOrders, FactInventory, FactReturns) targeting BronzeLH.

tasks.name: Organize Dataflows
tasks.description: Move all 3 dataflows into the '02 - Data Ingestion' workspace folder.

tasks.name: Create Orchestration Pipeline
tasks.description: Create PL_HorizonBooks_Orchestration Data Pipeline with 7 activities: 3 RefreshDataflow (parallel, no dependencies) → NB01 BronzeToSilver → NB02 WebEnrichment → NB03 SilverToGold → NB04 Forecasting (sequential chain).

tasks.name: Validate Connections
tasks.description: Verify dataflow OAuth2 connections are bound. Prompt user to configure credentials via portal if connections are unbound.
